query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `royalty_statements` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`collaboratorId` int NOT NULL,
	`projectId` int NOT NULL,
	`periodStart` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`periodEnd` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`totalEarnings` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`totalPaid` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`balance` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`status` enum('draft','issued','acknowledged') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`generatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `royalty_statements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	FOREIGN KEY (`collaboratorId`) REFERENCES `royalty_collaborators`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
	FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `royalty_projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
